tactics.name: Basic Fork
tactics.description: Attack two pieces simultaneously with a knight or pawn

tactics.name: Basic Pin
tactics.description: Pin a piece to the king or a more valuable piece

tactics.name: Skewer
tactics.description: Attack a valuable piece to win the piece behind it

tactics.name: Discovered Attack
tactics.description: Move a piece to reveal an attack from another piece

tactics.name: Back Rank Mate
tactics.description: Exploit a weak back rank to deliver checkmate

tactics.name: Exchange Sacrifice
tactics.description: Give up the exchange (rook for bishop/knight) for positional advantage

tactics.name: Outpost Play
tactics.description: Establish pieces on strong outpost squares

tactics.name: Pawn Storm
tactics.description: Advance pawns to attack the opponent's king position

tactics.name: Fortress Defense
tactics.description: Build an impregnable defensive position

tactics.name: Zwischenzug
tactics.description: Insert an unexpected intermediate move before the expected continuation

tactics.name: King Walk
tactics.description: Use the king actively in the endgame as an attacking piece

tactics.name: Opposite Color Bishops
tactics.description: Exploit opposite-colored bishop endgames

tactics.name: Queen Sacrifice
tactics.description: Sacrifice the queen for a decisive advantage or forced mate

tactics.name: Prophylaxis
tactics.description: Prevent opponent's plans before executing your own

tactics.name: Rook Endgame Mastery
tactics.description: Master Lucena, Philidor, and other key rook endgame techniques

tactics.name: Italian Game Opening
tactics.description: Learn the classical Italian Game with Bc4 targeting f7

tactics.name: Sicilian Defense Opening
tactics.description: Master the aggressive Sicilian Defense with 1...c5

tactics.name: French Defense Opening
tactics.description: Learn the solid French Defense with 1...e6

tactics.name: Queen's Gambit Opening
tactics.description: Play the classic Queen's Gambit with d4 and c4

tactics.name: King's Indian Defense Opening
tactics.description: Learn the aggressive King's Indian with g6 and Bg7

tactics.name: London System Opening
tactics.description: Play the solid London System with Bf4
